items.statcast_observation: Bobby Witt Jr. produced the hardest tracked Royals contact: 111.0 mph at a -3.0 degree launch angle.
items.summary: The Royals beat the Philadelphia Phillies, KC 5, PHI 2. Luinder Avila led the night, working 5.0 innings with 1 earned runs, 4 strikeouts and 1 walk. Bobby Witt Jr. supplied the loudest Royals contact at 111.0 mph.
items.title: Royals vs Phillies Recap
